Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-08-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: PETITIONER BIO-TEK TECHNOLOGY, INC.'S Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus.
Per order of the Presiding Judge, the matter is assigned to Judge Kramer in Department 303. The parties are requested to contact his clerk at 551-3726 to schedule a hearing date. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Ntc Of Motion To Set Hearing Date For Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jan-04-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER BIO-TEK TECHNOLOGY, INC'S MOTION TO SET HEARING DATE FOR WRIT OF MANDATE.
Appearances: Christopher Keele of the Keele Group (308.8466) and Michael S. Winsten of the Winsten Law Group (949.429.3400) (appearing via Court Call) for Total Renal Care, Inc.; Motaz M. Gerges of the Law Office of Motaz M. Gerges (818.943.0707) for petitioner Bio-Tek Technology, Inc.; Anthony R. Hakl of the Department of Justice Sacramento (916.322.9041) appearing via Court Call for California Corrections & Rehabilitation.
Discussed and the court modified its ruling as follows: off calendar. Petitioner is to request that the administrative record be prepared, and may then file a motion for writ of mandate. When the motion is filed, parties are to provide courtesy copies of their papers to department 302. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
